name: Chicken Tandoori (Indian Grilled Chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the yogurt, coriander, lime juice, cumin, garlic, ginger, salt, cayenne pepper, and turmeric. Stir to mix.
2. Add the chicken pieces and toss to coat evenly with the marinade. Cover and refrigerate overnight (or for at least 4 hours).
3. Prepare hot coals or preheat the oven's broiler setting for 10 minutes.
4. Turn off the heat source and place the chicken, peppers, and onion in the preheated area.
5. Cook until done, approximately 15 to 20 minutes. Baste with the marinade throughout cooking.
